overview: Single independent component with no dependencies, so it is implemented in a single foundational phase.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: Implement the standalone Go todo API service which has no dependencies.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Expose REST endpoints for todo CRUD and completion
Authenticate bearer tokens and enforce ownership-based authorization
Persist todos atomically with safe concurrent access
Emit structured logs and Prometheus metrics
components.architectureContext: Sole backend service handling HTTP/JSON traffic from clients directly. No upstream/downstream services; in-process in-memory store with JSON file persistence.
keyConsiderations: Use sync.RWMutex for concurrency and write-then-rename for atomic durability
Validate UUID format for id path param; return structured error bodies
Ensure PATCH is idempotent for already-completed todos
Do not log tokens or titles; include todo_id, user_id, status, latency_ms
Multi-stage Docker build on Go 1.22 with distroless final image, EXPOSE 9090
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /todos:
    get:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
    post:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TodoCreate'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
  /todos/{id}:
    get:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
        '404': {$ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'}
  /todos/{id}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Mark a todo as completed
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: {type: string, format: uuid}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Todo marked completed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
              examples:
                success:
                  value: {id: '3f1c...', title: 'Buy milk', completed: true, completedAt: '2026-04-17T10:00:00Z'}
        '400': {$ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'}
        '401': {$ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'}
        '403': {$ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden'}
        '404': {$ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'}
        '500': {$ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string, format: uuid}
        title: {type: string}
        completed: {type: boolean}
        completedAt: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        ownerId: {type: string}
    TodoCreate:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: {type: string}
        message: {type: string}
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Bad Request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    Unauthorized:
      description: Unauthorized
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    Forbidden:
      description: Forbidden
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    NotFound:
      description: Not Found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    ServerError:
      description: Server Error
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
